items.name: load
items.doc: Load registry from register.jsonl in the given repo path.

items.name: from_entries
items.doc: Build registry from a vec of entries (used by load and tests).

items.name: rule_count
items.doc: Total RULE: markers across all entries.

items.name: banned_count
items.doc: Total BANNED: markers across all entries.

items.name: list
items.signature: pub fn list(&self, category: Option<&str>) -> Vec<&RuleEntry>
items.doc: List entries, optionally filtered by category.

items.name: search
items.signature: pub fn search( &self, query: &str, category: Option<&str>, limit: usize, ) -> Vec<(&RuleEntry, usize)>
items.doc: Weighted search. Returns (entry, score) pairs sorted descending.

items.name: learning_path
items.signature: pub fn learning_path( &self, languages: &[String], phase: Option<u8>, ) -> Vec<(u8, Vec<&RuleEntry>)>
items.doc:
Learning path: entries grouped by layer for given languages.
Returns vec of (layer_number, entries) sorted ascending.
